AgentBaseTypePropertiesAppliance.description: Appliance deployment model resolution of AgentBaseTypeProperties. In the Appliance model all rp-determined fields resolve to read-only (the appliance owns and reports state; the client does not set these fields).

definition.description: Inline agent definition. See the AgentDefinitionAppliance sub-schema.

tools.description: Tool bindings. See the AgentToolAppliance sub-schema.

AgentBaseTypePropertiesPlatform.description: Platform deployment model resolution of AgentBaseTypeProperties. In the Platform model all rp-determined fields resolve to writable (the client owns these fields). baseTypes remains ARM-managed and read-only.

definition.description: Inline agent definition. See the AgentDefinitionPlatform sub-schema.

tools.description: Tool bindings. See the AgentToolPlatform sub-schema.

AgentDefinition.description: Inline agent definition describing the model and behavior of the agent. Mutability of the rp-determined fields is resolved by the deployment model.

modelDeploymentRef.description: Optional RP-specific reference to an underlying model deployment.

instructions.description: System prompt / behavioral instructions. Required on request when the RP exposes this field as writable.

AgentDefinitionAppliance.description: Appliance deployment model resolution of AgentDefinition. All rp-determined fields resolve to read-only.

modelDeploymentRef.description: Optional RP-specific reference to an underlying model deployment.

AgentDefinitionPlatform.description: Platform deployment model resolution of AgentDefinition. All rp-determined fields resolve to writable.

modelDeploymentRef.description: Optional RP-specific reference to an underlying model deployment.

AgentTool.description: A tool binding for an agent, aligned with Azure AI Foundry-style tool bindings. Mutability of the rp-determined fields is resolved by the deployment model.

type.description: Tool type discriminator. Must be one of the publicly documented Azure AI Foundry tool types.

AgentToolAppliance.description: Appliance deployment model resolution of AgentTool. All fields resolve to read-only.

type.description: Tool type discriminator. Must be one of the publicly documented Azure AI Foundry tool types.

AgentToolPlatform.description: Platform deployment model resolution of AgentTool. All fields resolve to writable.

type.description: Tool type discriminator. Must be one of the publicly documented Azure AI Foundry tool types.

BaseType.description: An ARM-managed base type descriptor identifying the schema contract a resource conforms to.

version.description: The schema version of the base type.

Conversation.description: A conversation resource holding the items and metadata exchanged between a client and an agent.

conversationId.description: Unique conversation identifier. Read-only (set by the service on creation).

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp of when the conversation was created. Read-only.

metadata.description: Up to 16 key-value pairs (keys max 64 chars, values max 512 chars). Writable on create and update.

items.description: Conversation items (messages, tool calls, tool outputs). Each item has type, role, and content. Up to 20 items may be provided at creation. Writable on create; additional items are appended by response execution.

ConversationItem.description: A conversation item such as a message, tool call, or tool output.

type.description: The item type (for example, message, tool call, or tool output).

role.description: The role associated with the item (for example, user, assistant, or tool).

content.description: The content of the conversation item.

InputMessage.description: A single input message provided to the model.

role.description: The role of the message author (for example, user, system, or developer).

content.description: The content of the input message.

Response.description: A response generated by an agent for a given input, including its output, status, and usage.

responseId.description: Unique response identifier. Read-only (set by the service).

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp of when the response was created. Read-only.

model.description: Model ID used to generate the response (e.g., gpt-4o-mini). May be specified on request to override the agent default; read-only in GET.

status.description: The status of the response. Read-only.

input.description: Content input to the model. Required on create. May be provided as a single string or as an array of input messages; see the InputMessage sub-schema.

output.description: Output items (messages, tool calls, etc.). Each item has id, type, role, status, content. Read-only.

previous_response_id.description: ID of a previous response for multi-turn chaining (alternative to conversation). Writable on create.

conversation.description: Conversation association: { id }. Writable on create to link response to a conversation.

id.description: The identifier of the conversation to associate with this response.

instructions.description: System/developer message for this response. Writable on create; overrides agent-level instructions for this invocation.

tools.description: Tools available during this response. Writable on create; overrides agent-level tools for this invocation.

tool_choice.description: How the model should select tools. May be a string (e.g., auto, none) or an object. Writable on create.

metadata.description: Up to 16 key-value pairs. Writable on create and update.

usage.description: Token usage: { input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens }. Read-only.

error.description: Error details if the response failed: { code, message }.

incomplete_details.description: Details if the response is incomplete: { reason } (e.g., max_output_tokens).

ResponseError.description: Error details for a failed response.

ResponseIncompleteDetails.description: Details explaining why a response is incomplete.

reason.description: The reason the response is incomplete (for example, max_output_tokens).

ResponseOutputItem.description: An item produced in the response output, such as a message or tool call.

id.description: Unique identifier of the output item.

type.description: The output item type (for example, message or tool call).

role.description: The role associated with the output item.

status.description: The status of the output item.

content.description: The content of the output item.

ResponseUsage.description: Token usage information for a response.

total_tokens.description: Total number of tokens (input plus output).
